name: HRSU Indore Store
description: Buy fertilizer-grade Calcium Nitrate directly from HRSU Indore Pvt. Ltd., manufacturer in Madhya Pradesh, India. 25 kg ₹750 · 50 kg ₹1,500. Free delivery on orders ₹4,500+. Pan-India 3–10 days. No card needed — pay via UPI or bank transfer after phone confirmation.

skills.name: List Products
skills.description: Browse the HRSU Indore Calcium Nitrate catalog — get SKUs, sizes, prices, and availability.
examples: What calcium nitrate products do you have?
What sizes and prices are available?

skills.name: Calculate Order Total
skills.description: Calculate the exact price and shipping cost for a given quantity before placing an order.
examples: How much would 6 bags of 25kg cost including shipping?
What is the total for 3 bags of 50kg?
Do I get free delivery if I order 8 bags?

skills.name: Place Order
skills.description: Submit a Calcium Nitrate order. No payment now — HRSU confirms within 1 business day and the customer pays via UPI or bank transfer.
examples: I want to buy 3 bags of 50kg, deliver to Indore
Place an order for calcium nitrate for my farm

skills.name: Get Shipping Info
skills.description: Get delivery rates, free-shipping threshold, and estimated delivery times for India and international.
